hero.subtitle: We deliver innovative IT support, cybersecurity and global staffing — keeping your operations seamless, secure and ready for whatever comes next.

marquee.title: Platforms & technologies we manage every day

about.title: Technology that moves with your business
about.body: Techwelt exists to make enterprise technology feel effortless. We blend deep security expertise, disciplined IT operations and a global talent network into one team that quietly keeps you running — and ready for what's next.
about.point1: A single accountable partner across IT, security and talent
about.point2: Engineers embedded in your timezone, on your stack
about.point3: Transparent SLAs and reporting you can take to the board

services.title: End-to-end technology services, one accountable partner
services.subtitle: From boardroom strategy to the service-desk ticket, Techwelt covers the full enterprise stack — so you can scale with confidence.

strategy.title: Strategy & Consulting
strategy.desc: We turn ambition into an actionable roadmap, aligning technology, operations and people around measurable business outcomes.

ai.title: Artificial Intelligence & Data
ai.desc: From solid data foundations to generative AI, we turn your information into automation, insight and real competitive advantage.

cloud.title: Cloud Services
cloud.desc: Migrate, modernise and run on the cloud with confidence — multi-cloud architecture, FinOps cost control and zero-downtime delivery.

cyber.title: Cybersecurity
cyber.desc: End-to-end protection: risk assessments, 24/7 threat monitoring, identity and compliance that stand up to real-world attacks.

software.title: Software Engineering
software.desc: Custom applications and legacy modernisation, built by senior engineers with DevOps, testing and quality baked in.

managed.title: Managed IT & Service Desk
managed.desc: Round-the-clock, multi-region operations and a friendly service desk that keep every site online and every user productive.

assets.title: IT Asset Lifecycle Management
assets.desc: Procure, deploy, track and retire hardware globally — full visibility, tight cost control and zero waste.

staffing.title: Global IT Staffing
staffing.desc: On-demand certified engineers and specialists, matched to your stack and timezone — for a project or the long term.

engineering.title: Digital Engineering & IoT
engineering.desc: Connected products, embedded systems and IoT platforms engineered for scale, safety and real-time control.

platforms.title: Enterprise Platforms
platforms.desc: Implementation and support across SAP, Microsoft, Salesforce, Oracle and ServiceNow — configured to how you actually work.

automation.title: Intelligent Automation
automation.desc: RPA, workflow automation and AI agents that remove manual effort and accelerate every process.

experience.title: Customer Experience
experience.desc: Design-led digital products, commerce and marketing technology that turn customers into advocates.

serviceDetails.ctaBody: Tell us your goal — we'll show you exactly how Techwelt can help, usually within 48 hours.

strategy.long: Great technology starts with a clear plan. Our strategists work alongside your leadership to assess where you are, define where you want to be, and design a pragmatic roadmap that ties every technology decision to a measurable business outcome — no vanity projects, no jargon.
strategy.p2: Technology due diligence and architecture review
strategy.p4: Business cases with clear ROI and milestones

ai.long: From the data foundations up, we help you turn raw information into decisions, automation and new products. Whether it's a predictive model, a modern data platform or a generative-AI assistant, we build it responsibly — secure, governed and measurable.

cloud.long: We move you to the cloud without the drama. From assessment and landing zones to migration and day-two operations, our engineers design resilient, secure architectures and keep spend under control with FinOps discipline — so you only pay for what you use.

cyber.long: Security isn't a product you buy once — it's a posture you maintain. We assess your real-world risk, harden your environment, and watch your back around the clock, so a breach attempt becomes a non-event instead of a headline.
cyber.p1: Cyber risk assessments and penetration testing

software.long: We design and build software that lasts — clean, tested and maintainable. Whether you need a new product, a legacy system modernised, or extra senior engineering capacity, we deliver with DevOps and quality engineering built in from day one.

managed.long: Keep every site online and every user productive — without growing your internal team. Our follow-the-sun service desk and infrastructure operations handle the day-to-day, escalate intelligently, and report against SLAs you can trust.

assets.long: Know exactly what you own, where it is and what it costs. We manage hardware from procurement to secure disposal across every location — cutting waste, improving security, and giving finance a single source of truth.

staffing.long: Get the right people, fast. We supply certified engineers and specialists who slot straight into your team — on your stack, in your timezone — whether you need one expert for a sprint or a whole squad for a programme.

engineering.long: We engineer the connected products and systems that move the physical world — from embedded firmware to IoT platforms and real-time control. Built for scale, safety and the harsh realities of production environments.

platforms.long: Get more from the platforms you already run. We implement, integrate and support SAP, Microsoft, Salesforce, Oracle and ServiceNow — configured around how your business actually works, not a generic template.

automation.long: Free your people from repetitive work. We combine RPA, workflow automation and AI agents to take manual, error-prone processes off your team's plate — faster cycle times, fewer mistakes and measurable savings.

experience.long: Customers judge you by your digital experience. Our design-led teams craft the products, storefronts and journeys that turn first-time visitors into loyal advocates — beautiful, fast, accessible and built to convert.

why.title: The numbers behind the calm
why.subtitle: We don't ask you to take reliability on faith — we measure it, report it, and stand behind it.
why.satisfactionDesc: Measured across every engagement, every quarter.
why.industriesDesc: From data centres to pharma to oil & gas.

certifications.title: Built on standards you can trust
certifications.subtitle: Security and quality are engineered into everything we do, aligned with the frameworks your auditors expect.

process.title: A process built for trust
process.step1Desc: We listen first. A deep discovery of your systems, risks and goals — no assumptions, no jargon.
process.step2Desc: A tailored roadmap with clear milestones, owners and measurable outcomes — built around your reality.
process.step3Desc: Proactive monitoring, continuous improvement and a team that stays accountable long after go-live.

industries.title: Trusted where downtime isn't an option
industries.body: Regulated, high-stakes sectors rely on us to keep critical systems secure and running — at any hour, in any region.
industries.bankingDesc: Secure, compliant, real-time platforms for modern finance.
industries.healthcareDesc: Connected, compliant care with patient data protected end to end.
industries.pharmaDesc: Validated, compliant environments for research and production.
industries.manufacturingDesc: Safe OT/IT convergence and smart-factory operations.
industries.retailDesc: Always-on point-of-sale, online stores and customer data.
industries.fmcgDesc: Scale and supply-chain visibility that keep pace with demand.
industries.energyDesc: Resilient, secure infrastructure for critical supply.
industries.oilGasDesc: Robust operations across remote, high-risk sites.
industries.telecomDesc: Carrier-grade reliability and scale for connectivity providers.
industries.publicDesc: Citizen services that are secure, accessible and accountable.
industries.logisticsDesc: Real-time visibility across complex, moving supply chains.

testimonials.title: Loved by the teams we keep running
testimonials.subtitle: Use the arrows to scroll the reel — real outcomes from the businesses we support.
testimonials.t1: Techwelt took our service desk from a daily firefight to something we genuinely don't think about anymore.
testimonials.t2: Their cyber risk assessment was the clearest security report our board has ever seen. We knew exactly what to fix first.
testimonials.t2Author: Chief Information Security Officer · Pharma, UK
testimonials.t3: We needed certified engineers across two countries in weeks, not months. They delivered the right people, on our stack.
testimonials.t4: Round-the-clock support that actually feels personal. Every ticket gets a real resolution, and the SLAs hold up.
testimonials.t5: Migrating our data centre felt effortless because nothing broke. That's the highest compliment I can give an IT partner.

news.subtitle: Announcements, insights and updates from across our global team.

faq.title: Questions, answered
faq.body: Can't find what you're looking for? Our team is one message away.
faq.q1: How quickly can you respond to a critical issue?
faq.a1: Our service desk operates 24/7 across regions. Critical incidents are triaged immediately, with response targets defined in your SLA — typically within minutes, not hours.
faq.q2: Which countries do you operate in?
faq.a2: We have registered entities in the United Kingdom, Italy, Germany and the United Arab Emirates, and our follow-the-sun model lets us support clients across Europe, the Middle East and beyond.
faq.q3: What does a cyber risk assessment include?
faq.a3: We map your attack surface, test for vulnerabilities, review policies and configurations, and deliver a prioritised, board-ready remediation roadmap with clear next steps.
faq.q4: Can you supplement our existing IT team?
faq.a4: Absolutely. Through Global IT Staffing we provide certified specialists who integrate with your team, on your stack and in your timezone — for a project or the long term.
faq.a5: Engagements are scoped to your needs — managed retainers, project-based work, or staffing. After a short consultation we provide transparent, fixed-scope pricing with no surprises.

contact.body: Book a free, no-obligation assessment. We'll review your environment and show you exactly where we can help — usually within 48 hours.
contact.name: Full name
contact.messagePh: Tell us about your IT or security challenge…
contact.errorBody: Please add your name, a valid email and a message.
contact.privacy: No spam, ever. We'll only use your details to respond to your enquiry.
contact.successBody: Your request is in. A specialist will reach out within one business day.

footer.tagline: Innovative IT support, cybersecurity and global talent — keeping businesses seamless, secure and future-ready.

careers.title: Build the technology that runs the world
careers.subtitle: We're a global team of engineers, strategists and problem-solvers. If you love hard problems and great teammates, you'll fit right in.
careers.perk1: Work with colleagues and clients across the UK, Italy, Germany and the UAE.
careers.perk2: Ship work that keeps critical systems secure and running for enterprises worldwide.
careers.perk3: Certifications, mentorship and a clear path — we invest in your development.
careers.perk4: Senior, supportive teammates who care about their craft and each other.
careers.openBody: We're always looking for exceptional engineers, security specialists and consultants. Don't see your role? Introduce yourself anyway.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: Techwelt respects your privacy. This policy explains what information we collect, how we use it, and the choices you have. It applies to techweltit.com and our services.
privacy.s1Body: We collect the details you provide through our contact forms — such as your name, email, company and message — and basic technical data (like your approximate country) needed to operate the site.
privacy.s2Body: We use your information solely to respond to your enquiries, provide our services, and improve our website. We do not sell your personal data.
privacy.s3Body: Your data is stored securely and processed by trusted providers acting on our behalf. We retain it only as long as necessary to fulfil the purposes described here.
privacy.s4Body: You have the right to access, correct or delete your personal data, and to object to its processing. To exercise these rights, contact us using the details below.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.intro: These terms govern your use of the Techwelt website. By using the site, you agree to them.
terms.s1Body: You may use this website for lawful purposes only. You agree not to misuse it, attempt to gain unauthorised access, or disrupt its operation.
terms.s2Body: All content on this site — text, graphics, logos and code — is owned by Techwelt or its licensors and may not be reproduced without permission.
terms.s3Body: The website is provided 'as is'. While we work hard to keep it accurate and available, we make no warranties and are not liable for any loss arising from its use.
terms.s4Body: We may update these terms or the site at any time. Continued use after changes constitutes acceptance of the revised terms.
